pi_items.source: Code analysis: setup_nx_witness.sh line 199 assigns camera names from CAMERA_NAMES array with 'Server Room Camera' as the third element, confirmed in setup_task.sh line 26 and verifier.py line 65
Code analysis: setup_task.sh lines 11 and 14 create and reference this exact path; export_result.sh line 37 checks for this file; verifier.py line 69 validates content from this path

Code analysis: setup_task.sh line 55 navigates to this exact URL; Nx Witness documentation confirms localhost:7001 as default admin interface; /static/index.html is the web admin path pattern found in setup_nx_witness.sh line 320

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a Nx Witness VMS environment with a target camera named 'Server Room Camera' that must be removed via the web admin interface at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html#/settings/cameras. Documentation of the removal must be saved to /home/ga/audit/camera_removal.txt, containing the camera's Device ID (UUID) for audit purposes. Admin credentials are admin / Admin1234!. The system uses Nx Witness versions 5.1.5.39242 or 6.0.1.39873, with virtual test cameras created by testcamera and REST API endpoints at /rest/v1/devices.
